name: io.github.Nikodem01/printwright
title: Printwright
description: Search and buy licensed 3D-printable models over x402 on Hedera, then verify certificates.

environmentVariables.name: BUYER_ACCOUNT_ID
environmentVariables.description: Funded Hedera account used only for confirmed purchases

environmentVariables.name: BUYER_PRIVATE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Local Hedera ECDSA key used only for confirmed purchases

environmentVariables.name: MAX_SPEND_CENTS
environmentVariables.description: Hard cap for one confirmed purchase, in US cents
